# flickr-cli

> Photo management, backup, upload, albums, and full Flickr API access.

## Overview

Photo management, backup, upload, albums, and full Flickr API access.

## Key features

- Full Flickr API access — photos, albums, galleries, favorites
- Backup and restore
- Bulk upload with album assignment
- Piwigo migration support
- OAuth1 authentication
- Single Go binary

## Documentation

- Authentication: https://thedavidweng.github.io/site/flickr-cli/docs/auth
- Capabilities: https://thedavidweng.github.io/site/flickr-cli/docs/capabilities
- Upload: https://thedavidweng.github.io/site/flickr-cli/docs/upload
- Backup: https://thedavidweng.github.io/site/flickr-cli/docs/backup
- Safety: https://thedavidweng.github.io/site/flickr-cli/docs/safety
- Agent Guide: https://thedavidweng.github.io/site/flickr-cli/docs/agent-guide
- Piwigo Import: https://thedavidweng.github.io/site/flickr-cli/docs/piwigo
- Architecture: https://thedavidweng.github.io/site/flickr-cli/docs/ARCHITECTURE
